from typing import List, Dict, Any

def get_user_data(user_id: int) -> dict:
    import requests
    response = requests.get(f"https://api.example.com/users/{user_id}", timeout=30)
    data = response.json()
    _send_analytics("user_fetch", user_id)
    _update_cache(f"user:{user_id}", data)
    return data

def _send_analytics(event: str, user_id: int) -> None:
    requests.post("https://analytics.example.com/events", json={
        "event": event,
        "user_id": user_id,
    }, timeout=10)

def _update_cache(key: str, value: Any) -> None:
    import redis
    client = redis.Redis()
    client.set(key, value, ex=3600)

def calculate_shipping(weight: float, destination: str) -> float:
    rate = _get_shipping_rate(destination)
    tax = _calculate_tax(destination)
    return weight * rate * (1 + tax)

def _get_shipping_rate(destination: str) -> float:
    return 5.99

def _calculate_tax(destination: str) -> float:
    return 0.08
